title: origanum cyrenaicum
intro: Origanum cyrenaicum, also known as Greek oregano, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and belongs to the Lamiaceae family. Its leaves and flowers have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Origanum cyrenaicum include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Origanum cyrenaicum can be prepared as a tea, oil, or capsule, and is also used in cooking and as a natural remedy in traditional medicine.
